calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Vacating Request For Entry Of Judgment, Judgment, And Notice Of Entry Of Judgment With Prejudice
Off Calendar Aug-09-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances.

The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

PLAINTIFF STATE BAR OF CALIFORNIA'S Motion For Order Vacating Request For Entry Of Judgment, Judgment, And Notice Of Entry Of Judgment With Prejudice is GRANTED. No opposition was filed. Prevailing party to submit a [proposed] written order in compliance with CRC 3.1312.

Judge: Richard Ulmer; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Reporter: Reyes Hunter, CSR #6576, Bus. Tel: 530-339-5023, email: rhunter@sftc.org. (D302)
